nasb.text: For indeed he was sick to the point of death, but God had mercy on him, and not on him only but also on me, so that I would not have sorrow upon sorrow.

esv.text: Indeed he was ill, near to death. But God had mercy on him, and not only on him but on me also, lest I should have sorrow upon sorrow.

cnv.text: 事實上他病得幾乎要死，然而　神憐憫了他；不但憐憫他，也憐憫我，免得我憂上加憂。

ccb.text: 他确实病了，几乎丧命，但上帝怜悯了他，不但怜悯他，也怜悯了我，没让我忧上加忧。

csbs.text: 事实上，他虽然患了病几乎死去，可是神怜悯了他；不仅怜悯他，也怜悯了我，免得我忧上加忧。
